open_file_hygiene: Applies to every remaining plan step: use bounded rg/targeted reads, avoid broad parallel scans unless required, do not leave subagents/dev servers/Playwright servers/MCP helper processes/long-running shell sessions open, close completed agents before advancing, and if Too many open files appears, pause, clean stale helpers, and restart from latest generated artifact state.
notes: Prerequisite script reported missing Claude command files: speckit.specify, speckit.plan, speckit.tasks, speckit.implement.
Codex execution path is available: project .agents/skills contains SpecKit skills and user Codex agents contain all required executor and consensus agents.
Phase 0 baseline passed: pnpm typecheck, pnpm lint, pnpm test, pnpm build, and pnpm test:e2e. Sandbox-only failures were rerun outside sandbox for GPG, Google Fonts, and localhost bind access.

Phase 1 Specify generated specs/002-product-line-switcher/spec.md and passed G1 with 0 markers. The generated spec is intentionally routed through all fixed Clarify sessions to restore workflow-level detail.
Clarify Session 1 encoded Facility/Product Line state decisions and reported no unresolved consensus items.

Clarify Session 2 encoded REST/SSE decisions. Q1 consensus tightened REST same-request 400 and { error } wording. Q3 consensus clarified that SPEC-002 adds server-side SSE scope authorization, authorized Facility aggregation, client filtering as defense in depth, EventSource reconnect, and a named global-event allowlist.

Clarify Session 3 encoded header terminology, responsive switcher placement, existing-design/no-icon/no-wrapper constraints, listbox accessibility, localization, Facility/global exclusions, and Playwright regression boundaries. No consensus was required.
G2 passed with 0 NEEDS CLARIFICATION markers.

Phase 3 Plan generated plan.md, research.md, data-model.md, contracts/product-line-scope.md, and quickstart.md. G3 passed. The generated AGENTS.md context typo was corrected from Playwrigh to Playwright.
State-management checklist created checklists/state-management.md with 20 items. Seven initial gaps were remediated and zero markers remain. No consensus was required.

API contracts checklist created checklists/api-contracts.md with 22 items. Ten initial gaps were remediated and zero markers remain. Consensus accepted the SSE/authorization contract and required generated-artifact fixes for malformed-vs-unauthorized status codes, duplicate/conflicting scope carriers, and dashboard/live-feed backing-route traceability.

Open-file cleanup completed after interruption: duplicate direct Codex helper children were closed, leaving one baseline helper set with normal file descriptor counts. Remaining plan steps must follow the open_file_hygiene guard.

UX checklist restarted from partial checklists/ux.md, closed five gaps, and now has 19 checked items with zero markers. Subagent reported no long-running helpers; post-close duplicate helper set was cleaned.
Regression-safety checklist created checklists/regression-safety.md with 21 items. Five initial gaps were remediated and zero markers remain. G4 passed. Post-close duplicate helper set was cleaned.
Phase 5 Tasks generated tasks.md with 50 tasks across 8 phases, 6 parallel-opportunity groups, 5 user stories, and 17 acceptance criteria. G5 passed. Post-close duplicate helper set was cleaned.

Analyze found 6 issues and remediated them in generated artifacts. A1/A2 security-sensitive consensus accepted A1 and required extra T041/T044 eventBus producer/source coverage for A2. G6 passed after the generated task/workflow patch.

Phase 7 core implementation landed Product Line feature flags, scope types, switcher UI, store persistence/scope invalidation/BroadcastChannel handling, REST/SSE scoping, panel request scoping, workspace-route selected-scope validation, and regression fixes for /api/agents/message injection order plus /api/chat/conversations scoped last-message lookup.

Current verification passed: pnpm typecheck, pnpm build, pnpm test (96 files / 1011 tests), pnpm lint (0 errors / 11 warnings), targeted Product Line API Playwright (2 tests), targeted regression Playwright (15 tests), and full pnpm test:e2e (516 tests).

Historical recovery checkpoint: Phase 7 was previously held open because expanded dedicated generated coverage files for flag-on UI/a11y/cross-tab/BroadcastChannel/route-matrix/SSE/panel-boundary tests were still unchecked in specs/002-product-line-switcher/tasks.md. The recovery pass has since closed those tasks and rerun full verification.

Recovery checkpoint rebuilt the remaining Phase 7 plan from specs/002-product-line-switcher/tasks.md: Group A T010-T012/T030, Group B T016-T020, Group C T027-T029, Group D T035-T036/T041, Group E T042-T043, and Group F final G7/status sync. Post verification is reset to pending because new coverage must be verified before G7 is complete.

Coverage Group A completed: header legacy tenant context now renders localized Facility copy instead of th('workspace'); workspace-init, workspace-flag-off, header terminology, and feature-flag Vitest coverage passed through pnpm test (99 files / 1015 tests), and FEATURE_WORKSPACE_SWITCHER=0 Playwright flag-off regression passed.

Coverage Group B completed: setActiveProductLine, persistence, BroadcastChannel guard/fallback, cache/URL ownership, existing scope helper tests, and same-origin cross-tab Playwright coverage passed; the focused Vitest run reported 103 files / 1027 tests.

Coverage Group C completed: WorkspaceSwitcher component semantics passed through pnpm test (104 files / 1030 tests), and browser-level keyboard/focus plus 320/375/390 px responsive switcher contracts passed in Playwright.
Coverage Group D completed: product-line route matrix, route-discovery traceability, and SSE contract/source checks passed in Playwright (4 tests).

Coverage Group E completed: panel wiring and Facility/global boundary source tests passed through pnpm test (106 files / 1035 tests). T042 and T043 are checked in tasks.md; final G7 validation and status sync is now active.

G7 completed: no unchecked generated tasks remain; acceptance evidence rows are pass; PRD and roadmap record SPEC-002 implementation-complete evidence while preserving the roadmap PR-merge status caveat; verification passed with pnpm typecheck, pnpm lint (0 errors / 11 warnings), pnpm test (106 files / 1035 tests), pnpm build, and pnpm test:e2e (526 tests). Guardrail greps found no inline runtime FEATURE_* reads outside feature-flags.ts and no new runtime gateway/global-boundary drift.

Post Verify Implementation completed: task markers are 50/50 complete; generated task paths were normalized to actual repo-native test files; path verification found 76 path references and 0 missing paths.

Post Integration Suite completed: pnpm typecheck, pnpm lint (0 errors / 11 warnings), pnpm test, pnpm build, pnpm test:e2e, git diff --check, feature-flag grep, and gateway/deferred-boundary greps passed.

Post Code Review completed and valid findings were remediated: Product Line agent views now preserve Facility/global agent visibility, WorkspaceSwitcher no longer shows empty state during workspace-load failure, and route scope resolution now honors JSON body carriers plus query/body conflict checks through resolveWorkspaceScopeFromRequest.

Post Cleanup completed: git diff --check passed, temp artifacts are ignored/untracked only, no merge markers or console/debugger/TODO drift were found, feature-flag and gateway/deferred-boundary greps passed, and no lingering Spec 002 dev server, Playwright worker, build, lint, typecheck, or test process remained.

Post PR Creation final verification completed before commit/PR: pnpm typecheck passed; pnpm lint passed with 0 errors / 11 warnings; pnpm test passed 106 files / 1037 tests; pnpm build passed; pnpm test:e2e passed 526 tests; git diff --check passed.
